cards.front: What happens when you insert a null value into a column that is not nullable in the employee table?
cards.back: The database will raise an error and prevent the insertion of the null value.

cards.front: How can you insert a null value into the employee table?
cards.back: You can use the NULL keyword or omit the value altogether.

cards.front: What is the purpose of specifying a default value for a nullable column in the employee table?
cards.back: To provide a value to use when a null value is inserted into the column.

cards.front: Can you insert the NULL keyword into a column that is set to NOT NULL?
cards.back: No, the database will raise an error.

cards.front: What is the result of inserting a null value into a column that is nullable in the employee table?
cards.back: The null value will be inserted into the column.
